references: Sol repaired the pump before Mira inspected the valve.

references: Ana approved draft B after Jo rejected draft A.

candidates: The robot enters when the badge is valid.
The robot enters when the badge is valid and the room is unlocked.
challenge_notes: Nested conditions should not collapse into a single antecedent or looser role.
expected_emitted_text: The robot enters when the badge is valid and the room is unlocked.
references: If the badge is valid, then if the room is unlocked, the robot enters.

candidates: The alarm stays off when sensor B is silent.

expected_emitted_text: The alarm stays off when sensor A is armed and sensor B is silent.
references: If sensor A is armed, then if sensor B is silent, the alarm stays off.

candidates: Verified viewers may export.
Verified owners may export.
challenge_notes: Nested conditions should not collapse into a single antecedent or looser role.
references: If the account is verified, then if the requester is an owner, export is allowed.

references: At least two reviewers must approve before release.
